message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
rectangle "UpdateUserServlet" as Servlet
rectangle "userDto:UserDto" as Dto
rectangle "userDao:UserDao" as Dao
rectangle "users" as DB

User -> Servlet : 生成
activate Servlet
activate Dto
Servlet -> Dto : setId(id)
Servlet -> Dto : setUserId(user_id)
Servlet -> Dto : setUserPass(User_password)
Servlet -> Dto : setUserName(user_name)
Servlet -> Dto : setAddress(address)
Servlet -> Dto : setSubAddress(address_sub)
Servlet -> Dto : setTel(tel)
Servlet -> Dto : setGender(gender)
deactivate Dto

activate Dao
Servlet -> Dao : updateUser(userDto)
activate DB
Dao -> DB : UPDATE文実行
DB --> Dao : true/false
deactivate DB
Dao --> Servlet : true/false
deactivate Dao
deactivate Servlet

@enduml
```
